headline: Bruins Bounce Back In Buffalo While Sox Get Shut Out By New York
morning_brew: Jeremy Swayman was an absolute wall in Buffalo, stoppin' 34 shots to keep the B's alive and movin'. After missin' the postseason last year, seein' Viktor Arvidsson net two goals and the boys show some grit on the road is exactly what the doctor ordered. We've seen this team struggle in the first round before, so gettin' a 4-2 win to keep pace in this series is huge. Swayman's .944 save percentage tells you everythin' you need to know about who kept us in it.

As for the C's, that was an absolute disastah at the Garden. You can't drop a playoff game 111-97 to Philly and expect to coast to the Finals. Jaylen Brown showed up with 36 points, but Jayson Tatum goin' 8-for-19 with just 19 points is brutal for a guy we need to be a superstar every night. We're the 2 seed with 56 wins for a reason, but that bench plus-minus was a total nightmare. If we don't fix the defensive rotations, it's gonna be a short spring.

Over on Yawkey Way, the Sox are breakin' my heart. A 4-0 shutout loss to the Yankees? Are you kiddin' me? Early gave 'em five-plus innings and only three earned runs, which should be enough to keep you in a ballgame, but the bats were non-existent with only four hits the entire afternoon. We're 9-14 and sinkin' fast in the East. I'm lookin' at these Pats draft mocks just to feel somethin', because this baseball season is lookin' wicked grim already.

trend_watch.trend: Two goals in the 4-2 playoff win over Buffalo
trend_watch.dans_take: The guy was huntin' the puck all night and finished his chances, exactly the spark we needed on the road.

trend_watch.trend: 19 points on 8-for-19 shooting and 2-for-8 from deep
trend_watch.dans_take: JT has gotta be the alpha out there, plain and simple—settlin' for jumpers isn't gonna cut it in the playoffs.

trend_watch.trend: 1.2 innings with 3 strikeouts and zero runs allowed
trend_watch.dans_take: One of the only guys who actually did his job in that miserable shutout loss to the Pinstripes.

news_digest.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Eastern Conference first-round takeaways
news_digest.dans_take: The experts are seein' what we're seein'—the East is a gauntlet and the C's can't afford to sleepwalk.

news_digest.headline: 2026 NFL mock draft: Schrager projects 32 first-round picks
news_digest.dans_take: Mock drafts are fine for talkin' points, but let's see who's actually left on the board when the Pats are on the clock.

news_digest.headline: MLB 2026: Early-season stats and numbers we're watching
news_digest.dans_take: They're lookin' at the numbers, but the only number I care about is that 9-14 record that's got us in the cellar.
